prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约4690→8239→3153→2154→1723，整体呈先降后升的V型走势；2022年因盘锦校区低分专业拉低位次至8239，2023年起主校区 专业回归后位次快速前移，近3年累计前移约6516名；2025年基准约1723名；本省理科（物理类）计划2021年91人、2022年57人、2023年49人，2024年新高考改 革后物理类计划20人，2025年13人；2026年物理类计划大幅增至48人，较2025年扩招约269%，竞争显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科 中国大学排名2026年第28名（2021年第28名→2022年第31名→2023年第32名→2024年第28名→2025年第28名→2026年第28名），稳居全国顶尖工科院校行列；2026年 高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号（2023年电信学部断档至60000名、2024年投档线异常传闻）；抖音热度排名第55位（较热），短视频曝光量中 等；历史投档异常信号为低关注级别，整体舆情对报考热度影响有限；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共10个：化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土木工程A、机械工程A、 工商管理A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A、生物医学工程A、控制科学与工程A-、环境科学与工程A-；工科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、 电子信息/通信、电气工程等大连理工优势专业方向社会热度持续高热（2026年专业热度分析显示计算机类、电子信息/通信均为高热推荐），推高报考竞争；贵州省2026年普通高 考总人数约29.9万，较2025年（约29.7万）小幅增长约0.6%，物理类考生估算约20.8万人（按2025年物理类占比69.7%折算），竞争基数略有扩大；大连理工大学位于辽宁省，在贵州省招生占比约1.5%（2025年），属跨省招生；非本省高校，地域偏好因素中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类 招生计划大幅扩招（13→48人）是影响位次的最关键因素，扩招使竞争显著缓解、位次后移；但学校顶尖985层次、热门工科专业高热度及考生规模小幅增长形成一定支撑，部分抵 消扩招效应。预测2026年理科最低位次约4456名，区间4010–4902名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（国家基础学科拔尖计划班）
- 人工智能（未来技术班/新工科大师班）
- 电子信息类（创新班/电信、自动化与计算机工科实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子科学与技术（含集成电路设计与集成系统）
- 软件工程
- 大数据管理与应用（含金融科技）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化工与制药类（化工、制药与新材料工科实验班）
- 材料类
- 环境工程/环境科学与工程类
- 过程装备与控制工程。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类大幅扩招，预测位次区间4010–4902名，较2025年1723名明显后移。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力（电子科学与技术、软件工程、大数据管理），一档专 业（计算机拔尖班、人工智能大师班、电子信息创新班）作为冲刺；位次接近区间下限（4010名左右）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（4902名左右）建议以三档专 业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 4690 → 8239 → 3153 → 2154 → 1723, showing an overall V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing; in 2022, the low-score majors at the Panjin campus pulled the ranking down to 8239, and from 2023 onward, as main campus majors returned, the ranking rapidly moved forward, accumulating a forward shift of about 6516 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1723; the provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 91 in 2021, 57 in 2022, 49 in 2023, and after the new college entrance examination reform in 2024, the physics category plan was 20, and in 2025 it was 13; in 2026, the physics category plan significantly increased to 48, an expansion of about 269% compared to 2025, greatly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 28th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (28th in 2021 → 31st in 2022 → 32nd in 2023 → 28th in 2024 → 28th in 2025 → 28th in 2026), firmly in the ranks of top national engineering schools; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving admission gaps or abnormal admission score signals (in 2023, the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering had a gap down to 60,000th place, and in 2024 there were rumors of abnormal admission scores); Douyin popularity ranking is 55th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure; historical abnormal admission signals are at a low attention level, and overall public opinion has limited impact on application heat; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 10 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Biomedical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-; strong engineering strength attracts high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communications, electrical engineering, and other advantageous majors at Dalian University of Technology continue to have high social popularity (the 2026 major popularity analysis shows computer science and electronic information/communications are both highly recommended hot majors), increasing competition for applications; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou Province general college entrance examination is about 299,000, a slight increase of about 0.6% from 2025 (about 297,000), with physics category candidates estimated at about 208,000 (based on the 2025 physics category proportion of 69.7%), so the competition base has slightly expanded; Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, with about 1.5% of its enrollment in Guizhou Province (2025), making it an inter-provincial enrollment; as a non-provincial university, regional preference factors are neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion of the 2026 physics category enrollment plan (13 → 48 people) is the most critical factor affecting rankings, the expansion greatly eases competition and shifts rankings backward; however, the university's top 985 level, high popularity of hot engineering majors, and slight growth in the number of candidates provide some support, partially offsetting the expansion effect. The predicted 2026 science minimum ranking is approximately 4456, with a range of 4010–4902.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Basic Disciplines Top Talent Program)
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Technology Class/New Engineering Master Class)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Class/Telecommunications, Automation and Computer Engineering Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Science and Technology (including Integrated Circuit Design and Integration Systems)
- Software Engineering
- Big Data Management and Application (including Financial Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical (Chemical, Pharmaceutical and New Materials Engineering Experimental Class)
- Materials
- Environmental Engineering/Environmental Science and Engineering
- Process Equipment and Control Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the physics category has significantly expanded enrollment, with a predicted ranking range of 4010–4902, a clear backward shift from 2025's 1723. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Big Data Management) as the main choices, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Top Talent Program, Artificial Intelligence Master Class, Electronic Information Innovation Class) as reach options; for rankings near the lower end of the range (around 4010), focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors; for rankings near the upper end of the range (around 4902), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年文科（历史类）最低位次约1463→1597→1860→1858，整体呈后移趋势，近3年累计后移约395名；2025年基准约1858名；本省文科（ 历史类）计划2022年10人、2023年18人、2024年25人、2025年26人；2026年历史类计划25人，较2025年微缩1人（-3.8%），竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第28名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号；抖音热度排名第55位（较热）；历史投档异常信号为低关注级别，整体舆情影响有限；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共10个，其中工商管理A、管理科学与工程A等与 管理类、经济类相关学科关联，对文科专业报考有间接支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 贵州省2026年历史类考生估算约9.06万人（按2025年历史类占比30.3%折算），较2025年9.01万人微增约0.6%；2026年；大连理工大学位于辽宁省，在贵州省招生占比约1.5%，属跨省招生；地域偏好因素中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年历史类招生计划微缩（26→25人） 使竞争略有加剧，但新闻传播学类社会热度明显劝退可能抑制部分考生报考意愿，两者作用方向相反；学校985层次提供稳定吸引力。预测2026年文科最低位次约1845名，区间166 0–2030名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 新闻传播学类（广播电视学、汉语言文学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 哲学类（含哲学+人工智能双学位班、马克思主义理论+人工智能双学位班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 公共事业管理（含公共事业管理+人工智能双学位班、知识产权）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年历史类计划微缩，预测位次区间1660–2030名，与2025年1858名基本持平略前移。位次在预测区间内建议以二档哲学类为主力、一档新闻传播学类冲刺、三档公共事业管理 保底；位次明显优于区间下限（1660名左右）可重点冲刺新闻传播学类。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1463 → 1597 → 1860 → 1858, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 395 positions in the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1858; the provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 10 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 25 in 2024, and 26 in 2025; the 2026 history category plan is 25, a slight reduction of 1 (-3.8%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 28th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving signals of admission cutoffs or abnormal score lines; Douyin popularity ranking is 55th (relatively hot); historical abnormal admission signals are at a low attention level, with overall public opinion impact limited; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 10 disciplines rated A- or above, including Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A, etc., which are related to management and economics disciplines, providing indirect support for liberal arts major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the estimated number of history category examinees in Guizhou Province is about 90,600 (calculated based on the 2025 history category proportion of 30.3%), a slight increase of about 0.6% from 90,100 in 2025; in 2026; Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, with an enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province of about 1.5%, making it a cross-provincial enrollment; regional preference factors are neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight reduction in the 2026 history category enrollment plan (26→25), which slightly intensifies competition, but the social popularity of the Journalism and Communication major may discourage some candidates from applying, with the two effects acting in opposite directions; the 985 level of the university provides stable attractiveness. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will be approximately 1845, with a range of 1660–2030.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Journalism and Communication (Broadcast Television, Chinese Language and Literature).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Philosophy (including Philosophy + Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree, Marxist Theory + Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Public Administration (including Public Administration + Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree, Intellectual Property).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The 2026 history category plan is slightly reduced, with a predicted ranking range of 1660–2030, basically flat with a slight forward shift compared to the 2025 ranking of 1858. If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Philosophy as the main choice, Tier 1 Journalism and Communication as a reach, and Tier 3 Public Administration as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (around 1660), it is advisable to focus on reaching for Journalism and Communication.
